1x1.description: A thick cable forms an elbow, connecting the left and top edges.

1x2.description: A tee-shaped cable exits left, right, and bottom edges.

1x3.description: A horizontal cable connects the left and right edges.

2x1.description: A straight vertical cable connecting the top and bottom edges.

2x2.description: A T-shaped cable connects to the top, bottom, and right edges.

2x3.description: A tee-shaped cable connects left, right, and bottom edges.

3x1.description: A tee-shaped cable connects left, right, and top edges.

3x2.description: A thick cable bends from the left edge to the top edge (elbow shape).

3x3.description: An elbow-shaped cable connects the top and right edges.
